name: Learning to Fine-tune Foundation Models under Resource Limitations
summary: arXiv:2607.10694v1 Announce Type: cross Abstract: We study the problem of optimal continual fine-tuning for a pre-trained Foundation Model deployed at a resource-limited device. At each time slot,...
description: arXiv:2607.10694v1 Announce Type: cross Abstract: We study the problem of optimal continual fine-tuning for a pre-trained Foundation Model deployed at a resource-limited device. At each time slot, a new batch of training data arrives, and the controller is faced with two options: either use the data to fine-tune the model and incur a compute cost, or do not fine-tune the model and discard the d...
author: Thomas Tsouparopoulos, Iordanis Koutsopoulos
